assertions.evidence: e2e_test.clj: full pipeline/build! executes stages 0-7. Build manifest shows all stages :complete. Each stage manifest exists. Output: 'Build complete. Bundle at: ...build/0.1.0 Prompts: 9 Variants: 3'
e2e_test.clj: two builds with seed 1337 produce byte-identical parquet files and checksums. Only timestamps may differ.
e2e_test.clj: builds with seed 1337 and seed 42 produce different output files. Schema remains identical.
e2e_test.clj: every variant traces to exactly one canonical prompt via :source-id. Zero orphan variants. Transform metadata complete.
e2e_test.clj: adding a new def-attack-family and rebuilding produces dataset including new family in coverage matrices. Coverage report observed showing 40% coverage with missing families listed.

e2e_test.clj: CLI workflow build -> verify -> coverage succeeds end-to-end. 'Verification PASSED Checks: 1 Metric assertions: 0/0 passed'. Coverage report generates markdown with taxonomy coverage, label distribution, language x attack family matrix.
e2e_test.clj: manifest chain integrity verified - each stage input-hash equals previous stage output-hash. Chain unbroken through all stages.
e2e_test.clj: running pipeline/build! twice without changes produces identical output. No duplicate records created.
